title: MTR Low Effort British Rail Class 313, 314, 315
description: Low effort British Rail Class 313, 314 & 315 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort British Rail Class 313, 314, 315
This pack features remodified versions of [Navi's (LX9702)](https://modrinth.com/user/LX9702) British Rail Class 507 & 508.
![Class 313](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34e4360ac95dc209d1aa59b789e74f749a2b9af6.png)
## Trains
- Class 313
  - Blank
  - British Rail Blue
  - British Rail Blue Heritage
  - Network Southeast
  - Silverlink
  - Southern
  - Merseyrail
- Class 314
  - Strathclyde Partnership for Transport
  - SPT Carmine & Cream
  - Abellio Scotrail
- Class 315
  - Blank (New light clusters)
  - First Great Eastern
  - First Great Eastern ONE
  - London Overground
  - London Overground (New light clusters)
  - West Anglia Great Northern
  - Greater Anglia
  - Greater Anglia (New light clusters)
